elements.text:
1. AND gates shown with 4 inputs.
   It's actually chaining of multiple AND gates
   since AND can have only 2 inputs.
2. Selector inputs are ensured the value are always 1
   when they enter the AND gate so that the value
   of that bit flows through the AND gate output.
elements.originalText:
1. AND gates shown with 4 inputs.
   It's actually chaining of multiple AND gates
   since AND can have only 2 inputs.
2. Selector inputs are ensured the value are always 1
   when they enter the AND gate so that the value
   of that bit flows through the AND gate output.
